title: Web site na IATF
summary: Say publikon website na International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: Kaukolan na IATF so napanmatalkan a publikon abung a mangipaliwawa ed modelo, mangilista na saray proyekto, tan mangipanengneng ed saray ontulong ed dugan onsublay a kundang.
why: Say site na IATF et ginawa bilang melag ya static project pian mainomay ya basaen, ipatalos, tan pansiansiaen ya aka-open.
scopeIn: Public landing pages ya mangipaliwawa ed IATF model

Public registry of accepted, active, and archived IATF projects with status, maintainer, repository, and demo (Pampublikon rehistro na saray naaprobaan, aktibo, tan aka-archive ya proyekto na Iatf ya walay status, manag-asikaso, reperensya, tan demo)
Say request intake page tan form
Saray pahina nipaakar ed gobierno tan transparency
Ingglis a pinagkalap ya akaparaan lan ipatalos so estruktura na satan
Static deployment diad Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Saray pribadon lugar na membro, akawnt, odino say pan-log-in
I-host so source code na proyekto, ya walad mismon repository na kada proyekto
Real-time chat, a manbibilay ed Discord
Issue tracking parad saray indibidual a proyekto, a manaayam ed GitHub repository na kada proyekto

title: Selfie na IATF
summary: Sakey a primeron prototipo na IATF, ya aka-archive kayarin asabi so natural a punto na itunda.
problem: Unonan eksplorasyon na sakey ya in-focused-accessibility tool diad silong na IATF umbrella.
why: Say repository et itatarya ed publiko bilang rekord na kimey, anggano tinmunda lay aktibon panag-develop.
scopeIn: Unonan prototipo na sakey ya in-focused-access tool ya itatarya bilang publikon rekord
scopeOut: Aktibon panag-develop odino kimey ed feature

title: IATF bot
summary: Sakey ya IATF community bot, aka-archive kayarin aka-stop.
problem: Automation ed saray IATF community channel.
why: Say repository et itatarya ed publiko bilang rekord na kimey, anggano tinmunda lay aktibon panag-develop.
scopeIn: IATF community channels, ya itatarya bilang publikon rekord
scopeOut: Aktibon panag-develop odino kimey ed feature
